title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 47.020 - Description of townships to be recorded — where
text:
47.020.  Description of townships to be recorded — where. — The commission shall, within thirty days after establishing any township, transmit to the office of the secretary of state a description of such township, containing the name and boundaries thereof, and shall cause the clerk to enter such description of record.
(RSMo 1939 § 13701) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12042; 1919 § 13163; 1909 § 11651
